gaps.title: More-info reply hydration remains summary-first
gaps.whyAccepted: 247 keeps the unified tuple authoritative, but it does not yet hydrate the full parsed more-info payload into the patient thread.

gaps.title: Legacy backfill remains repository-local
gaps.whyAccepted: The backfill command is durable in contract and migration shape, but the migration runner that would replay historical provider events is still a later operational concern.
